panel: First public release — Cuemark by Keyweaver for Adobe After Effects 2022+
AI subtitles as native, editable text layers with speech-synced word timing
Generate tab: transcribe from timeline footage or upload; SRT, VTT, and CSV export
10 caption presets and 13 animations with full Style, Text, and Presets controls
Impact Words — per-word highlight and single bounce; Style tab AA uppercase by default
Box Cascade — pill background with centred text as words drop in from above
Transcript preserves grammar and capitalisation; case changed via Style tab or presets
Bundled ffmpeg on Windows — video transcription without the AE Render Queue
Per-edit-comp subtitle sessions (Cuemark Subtitles precomp per comp)
15-minute max clip per generate; credits checked before transcribe
Account menu, in-panel update notice, magic-link sign-in, and Stripe billing
Free plan with 5 starter credits (~5 minutes of transcription)
